market_overview.headline: Market structure remains fragmented with SPY in pullback mode while tech diverges and crypto crashes.
market_overview.detail: SPY shows Bull Pullback → 21W but QQQ unstacked bullish, indicating tech rotation dynamics. BTC in Full Bear at -46% from fair value signals risk-off sentiment. 38% of stocks still Full Bull but Finance sector deeply bearish.

momentum_themes.headline: Memory & Storage Leading Tech Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology showing massive momentum with memory plays dominating. Storage and semiconductor equipment leading with 20%+ spreads. Energy and mining maintaining strong momentum.

sector_analysis.headline: Commodity Sectors Outperform, Tech Services Collapse

strongest.note: Complete sector dominance with all 10 stocks bullish
All industrial service stocks maintain uptrends

weakest.note: Massive sector breakdown with only 2 of 21 stocks bullish
Major banking weakness with over half in bear structure

sector_analysis.detail: Clear commodity supercycle vs tech recession narrative. Energy and mining universally bullish while software/services collapse. Finance sector stressed with banking weakness.

items.text: SPY showing bearish cross risk with 8W only 0.10% above 13W — breakdown could accelerate
Technology services sector in free fall with 90.5% bear structure — avoid software names
BTC Full Bear at -46% from fair value signals continued risk asset pressure
High volume pullbacks in ADTTF (1.53x) and BMYMP (1.27x) suggest institutional distribution
